title: Tale of Tyrants
description: A modpack which adds weapons, bosses, abilities, artifacts, and much, much more. Welcome to Tale of Tyrants!
body:
#                                           **TALE OF TYRANTS**
  

In this modpack you can be the hero, the villian, or even the reuler of the world itself.
 
Make your own story! Create your own legend!
You choose wether you are the hero or the tyrant!
 
Will you defeat the tyrants that rule? 
 
Will you fall to the power of their minions?
 
Or will you rise victorious?
 
Welcome to '**Tale of Tyrants**'
 
## FEATURES
 
-A skill tree thanks to Simply Skills
 
-Epic combat using Better Combat
 
-Endless weapons and spells
 
-New biomes
 
-Epic bosses and overhual of the ender dragon
 
 
 
 
 
 
_Please let me know any good mods to add in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/jxUdFavr)!_
